paper_announcements.summary: Announces release of Intern-S1-Pro, a scientific multimodal foundation model at trillion scale with accompanying paper.
Announces large data dump of agentic trajectories in Hermes Agent for training models to perform well in the system.
Announces research on how AI sycophancy affects prosocial intentions and promotes dependence, published in Science journal.
Releases dataset of 4000+ agent traces from GLM-5 in Hermes Agent format, uploaded to Hugging Face for training purposes.
Announces slime framework v0.2.4 release focusing on profiling and observability with trace timeline viewer and real-time reporting.

discussions.summary: Discusses recursive self-improvement in AI coming in fits and starts with S-curves and AI winters, not smooth progress.
Argues that 16GB RAM is plenty if software engineers cared about memory efficiency, criticizing bloated applications.
Comments on how people reading about automating white collar work while AI still has limitations in practice.
Discusses Sora AI video generation as a moral panic that produced some funny but ultimately unremarkable content.
Explains chess analogy for AI capabilities, discussing how alien intelligence might approach unfamiliar games.

announcements.summary: Announces Hermes Agent with multiple integrations and agentic capabilities, positioning as alternative to OpenClaw.
Announces DeepSeek web service experiencing major outage, noting it as unprecedented since R1 release.
Reports on ARC Challenge benchmark results showing improvement in AI reasoning capabilities.
Announces new agent data protocol dataset with 3M+ trajectories in unified format for training.

other.summary: Political commentary criticizing Trump's policies and actions regarding TSA agents and government operations.
Political post about Elon Musk's low tax rate compared to average workers like truck drivers and teachers.
Motivational tweet about not knowing one's ultimate ceiling for achievement and resource allocation.
Gaming deal announcement for Nintendo Switch 2 with Mario Kart bundle pricing on Woot.
Personal complaint about New York Times allegedly plagiarizing McMansion Hell blog content multiple times.
